title: Signal-Grid Actuation Tensor: Fewest Shared Multiplier Units
strategies: naive one-multiplier-per-nonzero-coefficient decomposition (trivial, reproduces the nnz baseline)
fixed last-axis slice-rank factorization: sum of frontal-slice ranks along the phase axis (greedy)
best-of-three-axes slice-rank factorization: pick the axis with the fewest total slice ranks (strong)
true CP-rank search / rational ALS below the slice bound -- open ceiling, uncovered
